highlights.description: Initial release of SystemForge Web component library monorepo
ProductGraph telemetry integration with session management and OTel compliance
Multi-tenant primitives with organization context and tenant isolation

added.description: Monorepo setup with pnpm workspaces and Turborepo
ESLint and Prettier configuration for consistent code style
Changesets for versioning and changelog generation
`@systemforge/tenant` package with TenantProvider and useOrganization hooks
`@systemforge/api-client` package with typed HTTP client utilities
`@systemforge/telemetry` package with TelemetryProvider, ErrorBoundary, and hooks
`@systemforge/pages` package with default page components (404, 500, Loading)
ProductGraphAdapter with session management (30-min timeout) and event batching
ProductGraph hooks: useScrollTracker, useClickTracker, useAPITracker, usePageLeaveTracker
ProductGraph adapter and hook exports with TypeScript types

documentation.description: MkDocs documentation site with Material theme
ProductGraph integration design documents (PRD, TRD, PLAN, TASKS)
